data.name: Hentai Girlfriend Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Have you ever thought of making yourself the perfect girlfriend? Now your dreams will come true!

In this girlfriend simulator, you get complete control over relationships. Choose one of 3 girls with whom you will spend your time (or maybe eternity).

You can do trivial things - watch TV together, walk. And you can act like a complete asshole! Tear off her clothes right on the street, offend or even push her under the car. Is it really realistic?

Above all, you will need to earn money to support your girlfriend. Buying her food and trinkets. Feel the true experience of owning a girlfriend!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® XP / Vista / 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 125 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible with DirectX 8.1
  • 儲存空間: 45 MB 可用空間
